message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
autonumber

actor "./zbox start-repair" as zbox
participant "gosdk" as gosdk

zbox -> gosdk: StartRepair(localRootPath, repairPath, statusBar)

activate gosdk

gosdk: check initialized allocation
gosdk: get list result with repair path
gosdk: create repair request
gosdk: process repair
gosdk: check for cancel repair
gosdk: iteratively get directory and files seperately till no more directories left

alt [not empty statusCB]
  gosdk -> zbox: repair completed and return
end

deactivate gosdk

@enduml
